2026-04-24T21:13:27.3568077Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-24T21:13:27.3568673Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-24T21:13:27.3569117Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-24T21:13:27.3569489Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-24T21:13:27.3569803Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-24T21:13:27.3570040Z [36;1m[0m
